## Runtime.ISessionContext interface

Context interface for session creation. Extends IConfectionContext with the ability to create filling editing sessions.

This interface is used by confection editing sessions to manage filling scaling.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface ISessionContext extends IConfectionContext 
```
**Extends:** IConfectionContext

[createFillingSession(filling, targetWeight)](./ts-chocolate.runtime.isessioncontext.createfillingsession.md)


</td><td>

Creates an editing session for a filling recipe at a target weight. Used by confection sessions to manage filling scaling.
